subheadline.en: Research Scientist working on wearable computing and creative tools

en: Leading interaction design and evaluation work for EMG Wearables and AI glasses at Meta
Experienced in real-time motion tracking and gesture recognition for wearables
PhD in Computer Science from the University of Toronto on 3D interactions for creative tools in AR/VR
Research portfolio spanning product prototyping, multimodal interfaces, user studies, graphics systems, and computational design
